notes.device: Use cpu to reproduce the paper default. Optional local choices are auto, cuda, cuda:0, mps, or cpu.
notes.torch_num_threads: Set to an integer on shared CPU systems, or null to let PyTorch choose.
notes.matplotlib_cache_dir: Local plot font/cache folder. This does not affect results.
notes.dashboard: Set enabled to false or run with --no-dashboard if the local HTML monitor is not needed.
